name: Caramel Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with the first pie crust.
3. In a large bowl, combine apples, sugar, flour, and salt. Mix gently.
4. Spoon the apple mixture into the prepared pie crust-lined pan.
5. Dot the top of the filling with butter.
6. Place the second crust on top and flute the edges.
7. Make several slits in the topping.
8. Bake for 35-45 minutes or until apples are tender. Remove from oven.
9. Immediately drizzle caramel topping over the hot pie and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
